titleStmt.title: SII 27.207: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 207. (A.R. No. 490 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Mahishāsuramardini temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1181, Piṅgaḷa, Phālguṇa ba. 5, Mīna 1, Sunday. The cyclic year given coincides with Śaka 1179 when the details of date correspond to 1258 A.D., February 24.

It records an order by the king when he was holding assembly in his hiriy-aramane at Bāraha-kanyāpura, with maiduna Voḍḍamadēva, Narasiṅga-heggaḍe, the purōhitas and all other ministers, stipulating that the three hundred mahājanas of Niruvāra were to pay annually 100 gadyāṇas to the king, 30 to the adhikāri and 301 gadyāṇas to the village. It also seems to say that this order would apply to the three villages, Kōṭa, Braṁāra (i.e. Brahmāvara) and Kōṭēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ śrīmatu
pāṁḍyacakravatti yarirāya gajakēsari
śrī vīrapāṁḍyadēvāḷpēṁdradēvarasara vijeya
rājyamuttarōttaraṁ pravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamiralu sakavarṣa
1181 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada phālguṇa
ba 5 Ādivāradalu kaṁnneyalu brihaspati mirddu
mīnamāsa 1 Ādivāradaṁdu śrīmaturāja
dhāni bārahakaṁnyāpurada hiriyaramane
yalu stirasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi voḍḍōla
gaṁgoṭu kuḷire śrīpāda saṁnidhāna
dalu mayi
duna voḍḍamadēva narasiṁga herggaḍe si purōhi
taru mukhyavāda samasta pradhānaruṁ purō
hitaru ṁmire niruvārada muṁnūrvvari
ge koṭṭa śāsana kramaveṁteṁdaḍe sa
mudāya variṣa 1 kkaṁ yarasiṁ
ge gadyāṇa 100 Ādhikārige gadyā
ṇa 30 grāmakke gadyāṇa 300 yī
mariyādeyiṁda migilu
da Arasaṁge pradhānariṁge grāmaṇi
gaḷiṁge geṁge vāraṇāsiya
lu sāvira kavileya koṁda pāpaḥ
kōṭadalu braṁmāradalū koṭēsaradalu yiṁ
tī mūṟu grāmadali saṁda mariyāde .
Digital edition of SII 27.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
